name: Sagitta
description: The Mark 1 Phoenix-class tactical interceptor featuring the first successful stabilized plasma lattice housed within a positronic matrix. Designed by Dr. Atlas as the inaugural testbed for Vector Reactor technology, the Sagitta demonstrated unprecedented power efficiency, maneuverability, and weapons integration, laying the foundation for every Phoenix-class fighter that followed.

name: Aquila
description: Precision assault fighter featuring the Talon Cannon system and advanced targeting capabilities.

name: Kestrel
description: Light assault platform designed for sustained engagements, featuring reinforced hull architecture, but low-output weapon systems.
